Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Absolute Burial]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — Absolute Burial is a sealing spell that surrounds its target with swirling white discs of Aetheric sigils.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The Absolute Burial spell carries its target out of reality and into an isolated pocket of Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The Absolute Burial spell has an anchor that is a ball of twisted white seals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 3''' — The Absolute Burial spell was contained within a torpedo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — Absolute Burial is a pinnacle sealing spell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — The Absolute Burial has a white spell-anchor that gleams like a small moon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Absolute Burial is a binding and restriction spell involving glowing circles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Absolute Burial has previously worked against a King of the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 23''' — Absolute Burial is a spell cast by the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 23''' — Absolute Burial is an anchor of darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 46''' — Absolute Burial is powered by Eurias.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 46''' — Absolute Burial is anchored by a twisting ball of white symbols.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 23''' — Absolute Burial is a technique used to seal targets.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — Absolute Burial is a technique that can lock Parryl away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Absolute Burial is a technique mentioned by Varic.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — Absolute Burial is a spell consisting of a ball of overlapping white magic circles used to seal entities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Absolute Burial is a spell used by Varic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Absolute Burial is a spell that can be crushed.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
